theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Archetype 5 (Luxury/Enterprise).
theme_and_archetype.core_identity: Premium corporate tech leader, sovereign-grade trust, Caribbean relevance, enterprise scale.

rules.headings: Tracking-tight, high contrast weights (Medium to Bold), never centered by default.
rules.body: Clean, highly legible, leading-relaxed for long-form content.

colors.rules: Avoid pure black and pure white. Use deep navy for dark mode to signal government/enterprise security. Use Coral strictly for highlighting 'Coral DPI' related items, and Nexus Blue for AI elements.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous whitespace. Use p-8 to p-12 inside cards. Section padding py-24 to py-32.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento grids for feature modules (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8).
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometric. Left-align text blocks. Asymmetrical layouts for storytelling sections.

components.hero_section: Immersive, text-heavy left (H1 text-5xl md:text-6xl+). Right side features abstract data visualization or high-end architectural/tech imagery.
components.cards: Minimalist. 1px solid border with subtle hover lift (-translate-y-1) and slight shadow. No heavy drop shadows. Crisp corners (rounded-lg or rounded-xl max).
components.navigation: Sticky global nav. Glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70). Must include language, theme toggle, and search.
components.buttons: Primary: Solid background, contrasting text. Secondary: Outline with transparent background. High contrast hover states.
components.cms_admin: Utilitarian, dense layout. Strict Shadcn component usage. Sidebar nav, minimalist tables, clear hierarchy.

interactive_ecosystem_map.concept: A 2D interactive node graph built with Framer Motion and SVG.
interactive_ecosystem_map.layout: Coral DPI is the central glowing node. SproutOS, AVA HealthOS, etc., orbit around it.
interactive_ecosystem_map.interactions: Hovering a node highlights its connection to Coral DPI, dims others, and shows a tooltip or side panel with stats.
interactive_ecosystem_map.visuals: Tech-blueprint aesthetic. 1px connecting lines, subtle pulse animations.

motion.entrances: Staggered fade-up (Framer Motion) for lists and cards.
motion.micro_interactions: Subtle border tracing on premium cards. Button arrow translate-x on hover.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA contrast ratio adherence. Focus rings must be highly visible (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2).

images.description: Vibrant orange lines and dots form an abstract network on a dark background, evoking technology and connectivity. Use for dark mode backgrounds or Coral DPI conceptual visualizations.
Dynamic view of a modern architectural structure featuring glass and steel elements. Use for Government Solutions or Enterprise credibility sections.
Low angle view of glass skyscrapers reflecting the bright sun in a clear blue sky. Use for About Us or Investors pages.

media.logos: Use monochrome SVG logos for partners to maintain premium aesthetic.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts (Outfit, Manrope, JetBrains Mono) via index.html or CSS imports.
Ensure the ecosystem map is responsive and accessible.
Use framer-motion for smooth transitions and hover states.
Add 'use client' at the top of components needing interactivity.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
